name: email-list
description: List recent emails from any configured email account. Returns message summaries (ID, sender, subject, snippet, date). Use email-get to fetch the full body of a specific message.

inputs.account: string? (named account to read from, as configured in channel_accounts.email. Defaults to the primary account.)
inputs.folder: string? (folder to filter by, e.g. 'INBOX', 'SENT', 'DRAFTS'. Defaults to all folders.)
inputs.unread_only: boolean? (when true, only return unread messages)
inputs.from: string? (filter to messages from this email address)
inputs.subject: string? (filter to messages with this subject)
inputs.search: string? (provider-native search query, e.g. Gmail search syntax)
inputs.limit: number? (max results to return, capped at 50, default 20)
